flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Full Sail University fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (75.9% → 53.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Full Sail University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Full Sail University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (40.0% → 44.3%).
